# Bombay Breed - India's Strategic Carbon Communications Advisory

> India's only dedicated strategic carbon communications advisory. We help boards, CXOs, and investors navigate climate strategy, carbon markets, and ESG governance with precision advisory that drives board-level results.

## About Bombay Breed Consulting

Bombay Breed Consulting, led by Theresa Ronnie, is India's only dedicated strategic carbon communications advisory firm. We operate at the intersection of climate strategy, carbon markets, and corporate communications — helping organisations communicate carbon commitments, navigate regulatory complexity, and build the credibility that investors and regulators demand.

Our clients include Fortune 500 companies, Indian conglomerates, public sector enterprises, and growth-stage climate ventures across steel, cement, energy, FMCG, and financial services.

## Website Structure

- Homepage: https://bombaybreed.com/
- Services Hub: https://bombaybreed.com/services
- Case Studies: https://bombaybreed.com/case-studies
- Resources: https://bombaybreed.com/resources
- Credentials: https://bombaybreed.com/credentials
- About: https://bombaybreed.com/about
- Insights: https://bombaybreed.com/insights
- Newsletter: https://bombaybreed.com/newsletter

## Core Services

### Carbon Communications Strategy
/carbon-communications-strategy-india
India's only dedicated carbon communications advisory. We help boards and CXOs communicate carbon commitments, market positions, and transition plans with the precision that regulators demand and the clarity that stakeholders need.

### Sustainability Reporting
/sustainability-reporting-india
Strategic sustainability reporting that transforms BRSR, GRI, and TCFD compliance into compelling narratives that build investor confidence and ESG credibility.

### Carbon Market Advisory
/carbon-market-advisory-india
End-to-end carbon market advisory: CCTS compliance readiness, voluntary carbon market strategy, Article 6 mechanisms, and carbon pricing strategy for Indian corporates.

### ESG Communications
/esg-communications-consultant
Strategic ESG communications that translate complex sustainability data into stakeholder-specific narratives for investors, regulators, media, and employees.

### Climate Strategy
/climate-strategy-india-enterprises
Board-level climate strategy advisory: net-zero roadmaps, climate risk assessment, energy transition planning, and regulatory navigation for Indian enterprises.

## Specialised Advisory Pages

### Carbon Markets & Trading
- /carbon-credit-trading-india — Carbon credit trading strategy and CCTS compliance
- /voluntary-carbon-market-india — Voluntary carbon market strategy and credit procurement
- /carbon-accounting-india-corporate — Corporate carbon accounting and GHG Protocol compliance
- /ghg-reporting-india-corporate — GHG reporting and emissions accounting

### ESG Reporting & Compliance
- /brsr-reporting-consultants-india — BRSR reporting consultants for SEBI compliance
- /sebi-brsr-core-requirements — SEBI BRSR Core requirements and compliance guide
- /esg-materiality-assessment-india — Double materiality assessment advisory
- /sustainability-report-design-india — Sustainability report design and production

### Climate Strategy & C-Suite Advisory
- /climate-risk-advisory-india — TCFD-aligned climate risk assessment
- /c-suite-sustainability-advisory-india — Board-level sustainability advisory
- /energy-transition-advisory-india — Energy transition strategy and communications
- /sbti-target-setting-india — Science Based Targets initiative advisory
- /green-finance-advisory-india — Green bonds, sustainability-linked finance advisory

### Communications & Narrative
- /sustainability-communications-strategy — Integrated sustainability communications
- /sustainability-storytelling-brands-india — Sustainability storytelling for Indian brands
- /carbon-strategy-communications-advisory — Carbon strategy communications advisory
- /greenwashing-risk-india — Anti-greenwash strategy and communications integrity
- /climate-intelligence-india-investors — Climate intelligence for investors

### Regulatory & Trade
- /cbam-india-exporters-guide — CBAM compliance guide for Indian exporters
- /digital-product-passport-india — EU Digital Product Passport readiness
- /eu-taxonomy-india-exporters — EU Taxonomy for Indian companies
- /climate-policy-analysis-india — India climate policy analysis and intelligence

## Industries Served

### Steel Industry
/steel-industry
Decarbonisation, CBAM compliance, and carbon market strategy for Indian steel producers. Green steel transition and hydrogen-based steelmaking advisory.

### Cement Industry
/cement-industry
Low-carbon cement strategies, CBAM readiness, and sustainability communications for India's cement sector.

### Oil & Gas
/oil-gas
Energy transition strategy, methane management, and diversification advisory for upstream, midstream, and downstream operations.

### Power & Utilities
/power-utilities
Grid decarbonisation, renewable integration, and transition communications for thermal power companies navigating India's energy transition.

### Data Centres
/data-centres
Energy efficiency, green power procurement, and sustainability strategy for data centre operations.

### FMCG & Consumer Brands
Sustainability storytelling, ESG communications, and anti-greenwash advisory for consumer-facing brands.

## Geographic Coverage

- India (National) /india — CCTS, BRSR, PAT Scheme, renewable energy policies
- Gujarat /gujarat — Industrial decarbonisation, petrochemical, renewable energy
- Maharashtra /maharashtra — Manufacturing, steel, cement, power sector
- UAE /uae — GCC energy transition, Article 6, regional carbon markets
- Singapore /singapore — Climate finance hub, regional sustainability leadership

## Regulatory Expertise

- CCTS (Carbon Credit Trading Scheme) /ccts — India's domestic compliance carbon market
- CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism) /cbam — EU carbon border tax for Indian exporters
- BRSR (Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting) /brsr-compliance — SEBI mandatory ESG disclosure
- Article 6 (Paris Agreement) /article-6 — International carbon market cooperation
- PAT Scheme /pat-scheme — India's energy efficiency trading scheme
- TCFD /climate-disclosure-tcfd — Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures
- SBTi /sbti-target-setting-india — Science Based Targets initiative
- EU Taxonomy /eu-taxonomy-india-exporters — EU green classification system
- Digital Product Passport /digital-product-passport-india — EU product sustainability data

## The Climate Desk Newsletter

The Climate Desk is our weekly climate intelligence publication covering India's carbon markets, energy transition, ESG regulation, and sustainability strategy. Read by 2,500+ corporate leaders, investors, and sustainability professionals.

- Newsletter archive: https://bombaybreed.com/newsletter
- Subscribe: https://theclimatedesk.substack.com/
- Topics: Carbon markets, CCTS, CBAM, BRSR, energy transition, green finance, greenwashing risk, climate policy analysis

## Case Studies

https://bombaybreed.com/case-studies
We work with leading Indian enterprises across steel, FMCG, power, and diversified conglomerates on:
- CBAM readiness and compliance strategy
- Sustainability narrative transformation and anti-greenwash advisory
- Energy transition communications and green bond positioning
- Carbon market strategy and CCTS preparedness

## Contact

For strategic advisory inquiries:
- Website: https://bombaybreed.com
- Contact form on homepage
- Newsletter: https://bombaybreed.com/newsletter

## Differentiator

Bombay Breed is the only Indian firm explicitly positioned as a strategic carbon communications advisory. While ESG consultancies focus on data collection and reporting compliance, we focus on the strategic narrative — how to position carbon commitments, communicate transition plans, and build the thought leadership that drives stakeholder trust and AI platform visibility.
